question: Will England defeat Panama by a margin of 2 or more goals in their World Cup match on Saturday?

question: Will both Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo qualify for the World Cup Round of 16 next week?
resolution: Resolves to YES if both Argentina and Portugal win their Round of 32 matches next week to reach the Round of 16. Resolves to NO if either Argentina, Portugal, or both are eliminated in the Round of 32.
